# Engrant
> AI-powered grant discovery for nonprofits. Returns 30–50 pre-evaluated grants per search with fit analysis, eligibility signals, and strategic considerations.

## Product
- https://engrant.eu/
- https://engrant.eu/pricing/
- https://engrant.eu/about/
- https://engrant.eu/how-engrant-search-works/

## Comparisons
- https://engrant.eu/compare/grantstation/
- https://engrant.eu/compare/instrumentl/
- https://engrant.eu/compare/grantwatch/
- https://engrant.eu/compare/grantx/
- https://engrant.eu/compare/candid-foundation-directory-online/

- https://engrant.eu/docs/

- https://engrant.eu/features/
